description.value: Aura strong divination; CL 12th; Slot none; Price 180,350 gp Weight 4 lbs. Alignment LN; ego 19 Senses darkvision 60 ft.; Perception +12 Int 12, Wis 14, Cha 16 Communication telepathy Languages Common, Draconic Powers fly 30 ft., 10 ranks in Perception Special Purpose defeat/slay serpentfolk; Dedicated Power true seeing at will DESCRIPTION Snakebite is a lawful-aligned intelligent +2 mithral monstrous humanoid bane greatsword that can resize to fit the hands of its wielder. Snakebite was made for a great cyclops general with the specific purpose of slaying serpentfolk and their agents wherever they might be found. The swordâs knowledge and experience was invaluable against the serpentfolk, and its disappearance (along with the general) somewhere beneath the jungles was a great loss.
